title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; interact with the local Ollama server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embedder inside LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (formerly ollama-ui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface) with multi-user support, model management, and RAG.

title: oll4ma/zephyr-ollama
summary: Toolkit that fine-tunes Zephyr-7B on your data and serves it via Ollama with one command.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + Streamlit to chat over your documents.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams answers from any Ollama model in your server.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake for reproducible Ollama builds on Linux/macOS with CUDA and ROCm variants.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Tauri desktop app wrapping Ollama for Windows/Mac/Linux with tray icon.

title: ollama-chatbot
summary: React + FastAPI starter that exposes a chat UI and REST endpoints backed by Ollama.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Community-maintained Rust crate for interacting with the Ollama HTTP API.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger SDK module that spins up Ollama as a containerized service in CI pipelines.

title: ollama-pypi
summary: PyPI page for the official ollama Python package (mirror of github.com/ollama/ollama-python).

title: npm ollama
summary: NPM page for the official ollama JavaScript package (mirror of github.com/ollama/ollama-js).

title: ollama-reddit
summary: Active subreddit for Ollama announcements, model requests, and troubleshooting.
